data.name: INVALID_CREDENTIALS
data.value: Invalid email or password.

data.name: USER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: User not found.

data.name: EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: An account with this email already exists.

data.name: UNAUTHORIZED
data.value: You are not authorized to perform this action.

data.name: SESSION_EXPIRED
data.value: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

data.name: INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN
data.value: Invalid or expired refresh token.

data.name: ACCOUNT_LOCKED
data.value: Your account has been locked. Please contact support.

data.name: INVALID_OTP
data.value: The OTP entered is invalid.

data.name: OTP_EXPIRED
data.value: The OTP has expired. Please request a new one.

data.name: VALIDATION_ERROR
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: ORDER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Order not found.

data.name: ORDER_ALREADY_CANCELLED
data.value: This order has already been cancelled.

data.name: CANNOT_CANCEL_ORDER
data.value: This order can no longer be cancelled.

data.name: ORDER_ALREADY_DELIVERED
data.value: This order has already been delivered.

data.name: RESTAURANT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Restaurant not found.

data.name: RESTAURANT_CLOSED
data.value: This restaurant is currently closed.

data.name: RESTAURANT_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: A restaurant with this name already exists.

data.name: MENU_ITEM_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Menu item not found.

data.name: CATEGORY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Category not found.

data.name: CART_EMPTY
data.value: Your cart is empty.

data.name: ITEM_NOT_AVAILABLE
data.value: This item is currently not available.

data.name: DIFFERENT_RESTAURANT
data.value: Your cart contains items from a different restaurant. Clear the cart first.

data.name: PAYMENT_FAILED
data.value: Payment failed. Please try again.

data.name: INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE
data.value: Insufficient wallet balance.

data.name: PAYMENT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Payment not found.

data.name: DELIVERY_PARTNER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Delivery partner not found.

data.name: DELIVERY_NOT_ASSIGNED
data.value: No delivery partner has been assigned yet.

data.name: WALLET_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Wallet not found.

data.name: INVALID_AMOUNT
data.value: The amount entered is invalid.

data.name: PLAN_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Subscription plan not found.

data.name: ALREADY_SUBSCRIBED
data.value: You are already subscribed to this plan.

data.name: INVALID_REFERRAL_CODE
data.value: The referral code is invalid.

data.name: SELF_REFERRAL
data.value: You cannot use your own referral code.

data.name: ALREADY_REFERRED
data.value: You have already used a referral code.

data.name: TICKET_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Support ticket not found.

data.name: TICKET_CLOSED
data.value: This support ticket has been closed.

data.name: SESSION_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Dine-in session not found.

data.name: SESSION_ALREADY_ENDED
data.value: This dine-in session has already ended.

data.name: TABLE_NOT_AVAILABLE
data.value: This table is not available.

data.name: ADDRESS_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Address not found.

data.name: REVIEW_ALREADY_SUBMITTED
data.value: You have already submitted a review for this order.

data.name: COUPON_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Coupon not found.

data.name: COUPON_EXPIRED
data.value: This coupon has expired.

data.name: COUPON_ALREADY_USED
data.value: This coupon has already been used.

data.name: CANNOT_FOLLOW_SELF
data.value: You cannot follow yourself.

data.name: ALREADY_FOLLOWING
data.value: You are already following this user.

data.name: NOT_FOLLOWING
data.value: You are not following this user.

data.name: PROMOTION_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Promotion not found.

data.name: PROMOTION_ALREADY_INACTIVE
data.value: Promotion is already inactive.

data.name: INVALID_PROMOTION_TYPE
data.value: Invalid promotion type.

data.name: MENU_ITEMS_REQUIRED
data.value: At least one menu item is required.

data.name: MENU_ITEM_NOT_IN_RESTAURANT
data.value: Menu item does not belong to this restaurant.

data.name: COMBO_PRICE_REQUIRED
data.value: Combo price is required for combo offers.

data.name: HAPPY_HOUR_TIMES_REQUIRED
data.value: Recurring time window is required for happy hours.

data.name: INVALID_SPICE_LEVEL
data.value: Invalid spice level.

data.name: INVALID_ALLERGEN_VALUE
data.value: Invalid allergen value.

data.name: INVALID_DIETARY_TAG
data.value: Invalid dietary tag value.

data.name: NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: CONFLICT
data.value: A conflict occurred with the current state.

data.name: FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action.

data.name: INTERNAL_ERROR
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: TITLE_VALIDATION_ERROR
data.value: Validation Error

data.name: TITLE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Not Found

data.name: TITLE_CONFLICT
data.value: Conflict

data.name: TITLE_FORBIDDEN
data.value: Forbidden

data.name: TITLE_DOMAIN_ERROR
data.value: Domain Error

data.name: TITLE_INTERNAL_ERROR
data.value: Internal Server Error

data.name: GROUP_ORDER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Group order not found.

data.name: GROUP_ORDER_EXPIRED
data.value: This group order has expired.

data.name: GROUP_ORDER_NOT_ACTIVE
data.value: Group order is not active.

data.name: GROUP_ORDER_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: You already have an active group order.

data.name: NOT_INITIATOR
data.value: Only the initiator can perform this action.

data.name: NOT_PARTICIPANT
data.value: You are not a participant in this group order.

data.name: INITIATOR_CANNOT_LEAVE
data.value: The initiator cannot leave. Cancel the group order instead.

data.name: PARTICIPANT_ALREADY_READY
data.value: You are already marked as ready.

data.name: NOT_ALL_READY
data.value: Not all participants are ready yet.

data.name: GROUP_CART_EMPTY
data.value: The group cart is empty. Add items before finalizing.

data.name: LOYALTY_ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Loyalty account not found.

data.name: LOYALTY_REWARD_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Loyalty reward not found.

data.name: LOYALTY_REWARD_UNAVAILABLE
data.value: This reward is not available for redemption.

data.name: LOYALTY_INSUFFICIENT_POINTS
data.value: Insufficient loyalty points.

data.name: LOYALTY_REWARD_OUT_OF_STOCK
data.value: This reward is out of stock.

data.name: LOYALTY_ALREADY_EARNED
data.value: Points have already been earned for this order.

data.name: DISPUTE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Dispute not found.

data.name: DISPUTE_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: An active dispute already exists for this order.

data.name: DISPUTE_ALREADY_RESOLVED
data.value: This dispute has already been resolved or closed.

data.name: DISPUTE_ORDER_NOT_ELIGIBLE
data.value: This order is not eligible for a dispute.

data.name: DISPUTE_CANNOT_ADD_MESSAGE
data.value: Cannot add messages to a resolved, closed, or rejected dispute.

data.name: DISPUTE_INVALID_ISSUE_TYPE
data.value: Invalid dispute issue type.

data.name: DISPUTE_INVALID_RESOLUTION_TYPE
data.value: Invalid dispute resolution type.

data.name: DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_AMOUNT_REQUIRED
data.value: Resolution amount is required for refund or credit resolutions.

data.name: EXPERIMENT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Experiment not found.

data.name: EXPERIMENT_KEY_DUPLICATE
data.value: An experiment with this key already exists.

data.name: EXPERIMENT_INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION
data.value: This status transition is not allowed for the experiment.

data.name: EXPERIMENT_ALLOCATION_INVALID
data.value: Variant allocations must sum to 100 with exactly one control.
